name: Tandoori Murgh (Tandoori Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chicken; drumsticks, breasts, or thighs
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend 1 nutmeg, 1 1/2 tsp green cardamom pods, 4 cinnamon sticks, 1 tbsp whole cloves, 1 tsp peppercorns, and 1 tsp cumin seeds together.
2. Skin the chicken, wash, and pat dry with a paper towel.
3. Make deep cuts on the surface of the chicken with a knife.
4. Mince or grate ginger and garlic. Transfer to a small bowl and add the spices. Mix well.
5. Rub the paste into the chicken and let marinate for several hours in the refrigerator.
6. Cook the chicken on a grill or in the broiler (30 minutes for legs), basting with leftover marinade and turning to ensure even cooking.
7. Serve with a dash of lemon juice.
Serves: 4-6
